items.name_en: Genuine factory-made, ZP-grade authentic quality. We ensure all materials, hardware, stitching, and edges use 100% authentic raw materials.
items.name_cn:
Genuine factory-made, ZP-grade authentic quality. We ensure all materials, hardware, stitching, and edges use 100% authentic raw materials.
M46740
SAUMUR BB Handbag
Exclusive channel goods, Gemini launch exclusive, pure original quilted fabric + real hardware assembly, European ZP surplus stock
The Saumur BB Handbag is crafted from Monogram canvas, reinterpreting a beloved classic design with a contemporary touch. The saddle bag silhouette and calfskin buckle embody a knightly spirit, while the hidden magnetic closure on the front ensures easy opening. Its compact structure accommodates daily essentials, and the detachable shoulder strap and handle offer versatile carrying options.
Detailed Features
20 x 16 x 7.5 cm (Length x Height x Width)
Monogram Coated Canvas
Calfskin Trim
Microfiber Lining
Hardware
Calfskin buckle and magnetic closure
Side buckle
Back patch pocket
Strap: Detachable, adjustable
Strap half-length: 44.0 cm
Strap half-length adjustable to: 51.0 cm
Handle: Single handle, detachable
Includes exclusive high-end ZP packaging

items.name_cn:
OnTheGo Small Series | CODE:M46373
2023 Early Spring Collection [Exclusive Quality]
🤎Size: 25 x 19 x 11.5cm
The best choice for this season's new arrivals in the OnTheGo Small Series.
OnTheGo Small handbag features a mix of Monogram and Monogram Reverse canvas, accented with Monogram Giant patterns. The Toron handle and jacquard shoulder strap with brand embossing create a visual contrast, while the detachable coin pouch is perfect for coins or small essentials. Combining fashion and versatility, the designer truly understands every woman.

items.name_cn:
2024 Summer New Arrival, by the pool series beach vacation style onthego, tote bag shopping bag. Model: M11262 Blue. Original leather, full steel hardware.
This OnTheGo medium tote features Monogram Tiles canvas with a watercolor effect Monogram print, highlighting the LV Circle logo in the center. Calfskin handles and a hidden shoulder strap, rivets on the corner straps, ample space to hold a laptop and daily essentials. Dimensions: 35 x 27 x 14 cm.

items.name_cn:
M82926 Silver
Like the "Metis" leather goods series, this compact wallet is made of soft Monogram Unplant leather. The flap features a small silver S-lock style buckle inspired by Louis Vuitton's traditional trunks, a key detail. Despite its compact size, it offers practicality with a zippered coin pocket, 2 flat pockets, and 6 card slots.
11.5 x 8.5 x 4 cm

items.name_cn:
M11969
The 'Zippy Wallet' is updated this season with Monogram Unplant leather featuring embossed Monogram patterns. The elegant silver metal hardware contrasts with the supple grained leather, making this versatile wallet very attractive. The capacity revealed upon opening the zipper, along with the easy-to-organize interior, is also appealing. It features a bill compartment, a zippered coin pocket, and 12 card slots, offering excellent practicality.
Size: 19.5 10.5 2.5.
